approvingDesc: Securely approving your mock payment request...
title: Start sitting right — BaroSit plans
subtitle: From a quick try in your web browser to a dedicated desktop app, choose what fits you

free.tagline: An onboarding web monitoring engine you can feel with a single browser launch
free.ctaUse: Always free in your web browser
free.feat1: 7 core real-time posture detections with feedback
free.feat4: Background monitoring (computation pauses when the browser is hidden)
free.feat5: Mini desktop widget mode (Tauri app only)

pro.name: PRO (desktop app only)
pro.tagline: The desktop companion that quietly keeps an eye on your posture in the background
pro.feat3: Mini desktop widget mode in the corner of your screen
pro.feat4: Precision posture calendar analysis and detailed hourly charts
pro.feat5: Settings sync across all your PCs/laptops

demoNote: * This is a mock-payment demo; no real charge is made.
successDesc1: Welcome to the BaroSit PRO family, your ultimate posture-care partner.
successDesc2: Download and run the installable desktop app for your OS below.

web.successDesc: Your mock payment completed successfully. Now enjoy all of BaroSit PRO's powerful benefits without limits — background monitoring, native notifications, the desktop mini widget, and more!
web.title: Simple pricing, free forever to start
web.subtitle: The core of posture detection is free forever. Pro just adds multi-device sync and reports.
freeFeats: Limit: no mini desktop widget mode
proFeats: Mini desktop widget mode in the corner of your screen
Precision posture calendar analysis and charts

krwNote: Foreign prices are approximate, based on exchange rates as of Jun 4, 2026 (≈ ₩1,500 / $1). You're billed in Korean won (KRW): ₩4,900/mo or ₩36,000/yr.
